name: Roasted Onion, Endive and Orange Salad
recipeInstructions:
---------------------LEMON VINAIGRETTE---------------------
1/4 cup Lemon juice
1 tablespoon White wine vinegar
1 tablespoon Dijon mustard
1/2 cup Olive oil
3 tablespoons Reserved orange juice
Salt to taste
Freshly ground pepper
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Cut onion in half and slice each half into 4 wedges.
3. Separate wedges into individual pieces.
4. In a bowl, toss onions with olive oil and balsamic vinegar. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Place on cookie sheet, bake for 20 minutes or until onion wedges are browned. Reserve.
6. Clean stalks from watercress and toss leaves with onions.
7. Slice Belgian endives into 1/2-inch slices and add to bowl.
8. Wash and stem spinach. Dry well and tear into bite-sized pieces.
9. Cut skin and white pith from oranges.
10. Over a bowl, cut oranges into segments, reserving the juice that escapes.
11. To make dressing, combine lemon juice with reserved orange juice, add Dijon mustard and white wine vinegar, then whisk in olive oil. Season with salt and pepper.
12. Just before serving, toss lemon vinaigrette with onions, orange, and vegetables.
